channel.title: NAR Sardar, D Satish, S Birla, D Gupta | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAR Sardar, D Satish, S Birla, D Gupta

image.title: NAR Sardar, D Satish, S Birla, D Gupta

item.title: Dataset of mutational analysis, miRNAs targeting SARS-CoV-2 genes and host gene expression in SARS-CoV and SARS-CoV-2 infections.

Integrative analyses of SARS-CoV-2 genomes from different geographical locations reveal unique features potentially consequential to host-virus interaction, pathogenesis and clues for novel therapies.
